Disclaimer | Heartwood Craft

Effective Date: October 20, 2025

This website provides general information about Heartwood Craft and our home remodeling services, including bathrooms, basements, decks, custom carpentry, and whole-home renovations. The content is for educational purposes only and does not replace professional advice or create a service agreement. Contacting us through email or website forms does not obligate us to provide services.

All projects are unique. Actual results depend on home conditions, material selection, design, local codes, and proper maintenance. Accurate estimates, timelines, and recommendations are provided only after an in-person consultation and a signed service agreement.

While we strive for accurate, up-to-date content, we do not guarantee completeness, currentness, or applicability to your specific project. Heartwood Craft is not responsible for damages or losses from using the website, relying on its content, or visiting third-party links. References to manufacturers, suppliers, or external sites are for convenience only and do not constitute endorsements.

Professional consultation is required for project-specific guidance, binding estimates, and tailored solutions. Website content, including service descriptions, pricing ranges, and availability, may change without notice.

For questions, consultations, or service information, contact:

Heartwood Craft Serving Bozeman, Belgrade, Gallatin Gateway Phone: (406) 551-5061 Email: eric@iheartwoodcraft.com

By using this website, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use this site.

Last Updated: October 20, 2025

HEARTWOOD CRAFT

Quality. Integrity. Beauty.
